positive: A sophisticated, minimalist illustration of a cosmic forest biome. The scene features bioluminescent flora and fauna—large, stylized leaves glow with shades of teal and violet, illuminated by soft, ethereal moonlight filtering through geometric canopy structures. The central element is a majestic, silhouetted stag with glowing antlers, standing peacefully in a crystalline clearing. The overall aesthetic is deeply saturated, high-contrast, and clean vector-art inspired, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on clean lines, strong graphic elements, and a sense of magical serenity. Limited color palette focus: deep indigo, emerald green, gold accents, and luminous cyan. Central composition, symmetrical balance, flat graphic style, nature illustration, seamless repeating pattern potential.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noisy, low contrast, complex background, gradient, depth of field, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, dirty
